parameters.name: RepoFilter
parameters.label: Repository
parameters.query:
let repos = AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name == "scan_completed"
| extend repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name)
| where isnotempty(repo_name)
| summarize by value = repo_name, label = repo_name
| order by label asc
| extend selected = false;
datatable(value:string, label:string, selected:bool)["*", "All repos", true]
| union repos

content.json:
# Is AI Native Monitoring

Azure Workbook for scan and report telemetry. These views use the `AppEvents` table populated in the Log Analytics workspace by the backend Application Insights integration.

Current window: **{TimeRange:label}**  
Repository: **{RepoFilter}**

content.title: Total scans
Total reports
Scan volume over time

content.query:
let repoFilter = "{RepoFilter}";
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name == "scan_completed"
| extend repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name)
| where repoFilter == "*" or repo_name == repoFilter
| project TimeGenerated, repo_name, verdict = tostring(Properties.verdict), score = todouble(Measurements.score), duration_ms = todouble(Measurements.duration_ms)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent scans
Recent reports joined to scans
